title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a new desktop application that provides a visual interface for Hermes Agent, enabling easier management of agent sessions, skills, tools, messaging integrations, scheduled tasks, and multi-agent workflows. It supports multiple messaging platforms and model providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and OpenRouter.
